splunkExamples.code:
index=windows EventCode=19 OR EventCode=20 OR EventCode=21
| eval EventType=case(EventCode==19, "WMI Event Filter Created", EventCode==20, "WMI Event Consumer Created", EventCode==21, "WMI Event Binding Created")
| table _time, host, EventCode, EventType, Message

tips: This method is highly stealthy because it blends with normal system activity
